title: Crystal Rebirth
description: This texture pack reworks some of minecrafts item/block textures in a way that i enjoy and i hope you can aswell.
body:
Crystal Rebirth is my personal take on Minecraft’s block and item textures, created to give the game a fresh but familiar look. This pack updates select blocks and items with clean, refined designs while staying true to Minecraft’s original style.

The textures focus on clarity and detail, giving blocks like stone, ores, and wood a more polished appearance, and items such as tools, armor, and materials a sharper, updated look. Every texture is designed to feel natural in the game, enhancing visuals without straying too far from the vanilla experience.

Crystal Rebirth will be updated frequently and supported across most Minecraft versions, so new changes and improvements will be added over time. This pack is a reflection of my own creative vision, and I hope you enjoy using it as much as I enjoyed making it.
